---
title: "The Rev. James Young"
---

## The Rev. James Young

**Dates:** (b. 1843/4)

### Description

Vicar of St. James, Grimsby

### Biography

He was the son of the Rev. Peter Young, Rector of North Witham. [<i>Recollections of the Rev. Peter Young</i>, 1851 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
